variants.name: 术士
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，如果你当晚提交了一条空白咒语，你要选择昨天被施放咒语的名称：该咒语的施法者会死亡。如果恶魔因你的能力而死亡，游戏不会因此结束，随后你“是恶魔”且保留你的能力。
variants.otherNightReminder: If the Demon dies, place the "Demon" token on the Warlock. Ask the Warlock if they'd like to kill at the cost of submitting a Spell. If so, ask them for the name of a Spell that was cast yesterday. Immediately kill the player (unless already dead) and place the "Dead" token on them.
